raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Gr: ἀσβ/ no Jerikus prett Rihteem/
Dewe tee Bezeru Tukteefi/ Rub-
bena Zilts Klatjuma/ un Ramo-
tu eekſch Gileadas/ no Gada
Zilts/ un Golann eekſch Bahsa-
ua/ no Manaffus Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Scheeirr tee Gelbetchanas-
Pilsfahti/ kas eezelti tappe
preekſch wiſſeem Israëta Behr-
neem/ un preekſch to Sweſchi-
neeku/ kas winau Starpâ mah-
jo/ ka us turren behgtu wife/ kas
kahdn Zilweka nonejauschi kauj/
ka teem ne jamirst zaur ta At-
fins-Atreebeja Rohku/ teekams
wiſſch preekſch tahs Drundses
stahwejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXI. Nodalla.
Lee Lewiti luhdsahs no Eeleasara un Josuſſs
ihpaschus Pilsfahtus: i. Kas wianteem orri
no teem Kaudim tohp dohti: 3. Teem Kaäti-
tereem: 4/ 10. Gersonitereem : 6/ 27. Me-
ratitereem: 7/ 34. Wiſſ Pulks irr 48. Pils-
fahti: 41. Ta eemanto tee Israëta Behrm
to Semmi/ un dshwo tur ar Meeru pehi
Deewa Sohlischanas: 43.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad peegahje to Letwitii
Banafstaji Tehwi/ pee Ee-
leasara ta Preestera/ un
pee Josuſſs Nunna Dehla / un
pee teem augstajeem Israëta
Behrmu Ziltu Tehweem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un runnaja us teem eekſch
Sihlus tai Kanaäna Semmê/
sazzidami: Tas KUNGS irr
zaur Mohsu pawehlejs munis
Pilsfahtus doht/ fur mehs dsh-
woht warram/ ar ſaweem
Preekſch-Pilsfahteem / preekſch
muhfeem Lohyeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lao verde Hrtefa Behr-
teem Lewiteem no fatwa Jhpachhu
ma pehz ta KUNGS Wahrdu
Jehohs Pilsfahtus un winna
Preekſch-Pilsfahtus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tikke ta nomeflota Tee-
fa preekſch to Kaätitereu Sa-
mehm/ un preekſch Aärona te-
Preestera Behrneem/ no teem Lee-
witeem/ zaur Metlofchanu trihg-
padeſmifs Pilsfahti no Juho-
Zilts/ un no Sihmeana Zilts
un no Benjamina Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem atlifkufcheem Ra-
ata Behrneem/ ktua zaur Met-
loſchann defmits Pilsfahti n-
tahn Gewräima Zilts Saimehm
un no Danna Zilts/ un no Ma-
naffus puſs Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem Gersona Behr-
neem tikke zaur Metlofchanu trih-
padeſmifs Pilsfahti no tahm Jh-
sfchara Zilts Saimehm/ un ne-
Ahsera Zilts/ un no Nawtaka-
Zilts/ un no Manaffus puſs Zilts
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem Merara Behrneem
pehz winna Saimehm/ tikke di-
wipadeſmifs Pilsfahti no Rub-
bena Zilts/ un no Gada Zilts
un no Sebulona Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tá dewe Israëta Behr-
teem Lewiteem Jehohs Pilsfa-
tus un winnu Preekſch-Pils-
fahtus/ zaur Metlofchanu/ itti-
ká tas KUNGS zaur Mohsi-
bij pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl dewe tee no Juho-
Behrnu Zilts/ un no Sihmeana-
Behrnu Zilts Jehohs Pilsfahtus
ko tee pee Wahrdá notanze.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
